text: Competitive dynamics in wealth management remain active, with UBS recruiting two Merrill Lynch teams managing a combined $1 billion in assets as of October 20, 2025. This represents a reversal of fortune for UBS following recent high-profile departures, though it highlights ongoing talent competition in the brokerage channel where Bank of America's Merrill Lynch platform operates. Meanwhile, broader credit market concerns have emerged, with analysts noting growing cracks in credit markets that could impact equity valuations going forward.
